5004.issue: [S5004] Plain setInterval() found in source files (main.js). Please use this.setInterval() or adapter.setInterval() instead.

5005.issue: [S5005] Plain setTimeout() found in source files (lib/leaf-connect/lib/retry-until-success.js, [main.js](https://github.com/TA2k/ioBroker.nissan/blob/master/main.js)). Please use this.setTimeout() or adapter.setTimeout() instead.

5601.issue: [S5601] i18n directory "admin/i18n" uses long format ({lang}/translations.json). Consider migrating to short format ({lang}.json) using "npm run translate convert".

5612.issue: [W5612] "admin/jsonConfig.json5/items/tab2/items/regionev" attribute "label" uses key "Region" which is not found in the English translation file at "admin/i18n/en".

8004.issue: [W8004] Please process PR [[#145] "[iobroker-bot] Align @tsconfig/nodeXX with engines.node in [package.json](https://github.com/TA2k/ioBroker.nissan/blob/master/package.json)"](https://github.com/TA2k/ioBroker.nissan/issues/145)

0088.issue: [S0088] "/tsconfig.json" should contain an extends clause like "extends": "@tsconfig/node20/tsconfig.json" (see ioBroker.examples).

0028.issue: [W0028] Minimum node.js version 22 recommended. The current engines.node clause ">= 20.0.0" allows Node.js 20.0.0 as minimum. Please update it to require at least ">=22" at [package.json](https://github.com/TA2k/ioBroker.nissan/blob/master/package.json).

0034.issue: [W0034] @iobroker/adapter-core 3.3.2 specified. 3.4.1 (or newer) is current. Please update dependencies at [package.json](https://github.com/TA2k/ioBroker.nissan/blob/master/package.json)

0066.issue: [W0066] "@types/node":"^25.9.2" at [package.json](https://github.com/TA2k/ioBroker.nissan/blob/master/package.json) allows major version greater than 20. Downgrade to node.js 20.x.x to avoid wrong typing is recommended.
